sections.title: A: Original key word transformation practice
sections.instructions: Complete the second sentence so that it keeps the same meaning as the first.

items.sentence:
Mia began the class project before the lesson on Units 16, 17 and 18. **ACROSS**
The class project ...... before the lesson on Units 16, 17 and 18.

Leo began the study group before the lesson on Units 16, 17 and 18. **DIFFERENCE**
The study group ...... before the lesson on Units 16, 17 and 18.

Sara began the exam workshop before the lesson on Units 16, 17 and 18. **MADE**
The exam workshop ...... before the lesson on Units 16, 17 and 18.

Tom began the online lesson before the lesson on Units 16, 17 and 18. **AWAY**
The online lesson ...... before the lesson on Units 16, 17 and 18.

Nina began the school club before the lesson on Units 16, 17 and 18. **DOWN**
The school club ...... before the lesson on Units 16, 17 and 18.

Oscar began the revision session before the lesson on Units 16, 17 and 18. **RESULTED**
The revision session ...... before the lesson on Units 16, 17 and 18.

Iris began the practice notebook before the lesson on Units 16, 17 and 18. **NUMBER**
The practice notebook ...... before the lesson on Units 16, 17 and 18.

Ben began the language lab before the lesson on Units 16, 17 and 18. **FULL**
The language lab ...... before the lesson on Units 16, 17 and 18.
